acceptance_criteria.text: File exists at design/agent-wallet.html; design/ dir exists.
proof: ls design/ | sort returns agent-wallet.html, agents.html, landing.html, running.html, wizard.html

acceptance_criteria.text: Doctype, <html lang>, charset utf-8, viewport meta.
Exactly one <title>, <= 5 words.
Exactly one primary CTA Done; summary not in cta class.
No secondary CTA labels.
proof: Case-insensitive grep returns 0 for each of: Learn more, Read more, See more, Get started, Sign up, Sign in, Log in, More info

acceptance_criteria.text: Exactly one <details>, default closed.
Exactly one <summary>, text byte-equals 'Show address'.
proof: Summary inner text byte-equals 'Show address' (2 words, no trailing punctuation)

acceptance_criteria.text: Exactly one <code>, text byte-equals locked sample address.
No scripts, no src=, no external links, no @import, no ://, no CDN hosts.
Exactly one <style> in <head>; zero inline style= attributes.
Marketing buzzword ban (17 terms).
proof: Case-insensitive count returns 0 for each of: revolutionary, seamless, unleash, harness, empower, best-in-class, world-class, cutting-edge, leverage, synergy, streamline, next-generation, game-changer, transform, we're excited, introducing, unlock

acceptance_criteria.text: Em-dash (U+2014) and en-dash (U+2013) ban.
No ! in visible body text (style block and comments stripped).
proof: Python strip of <style>, comments, and tags leaves visible body text with 0 '!' characters

acceptance_criteria.text: Crypto-hidden narrow relaxation: wallet <= 5, other crypto terms = 0.
proof: grep -ciw returns 0 for each of: chain, gas, signature, USDC, ETH, X-Layer, EVM, blockchain, crypto

acceptance_criteria.text: Chain-name ban.
proof: Case-insensitive grep returns 0 for each of: X-Layer, xlayer, Base, Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism

acceptance_criteria.text: Exactly one '0x' substring, inside the locked sample address in the single <code>.
proof: The single 0x substring sits inside the <code> element containing the sample address

acceptance_criteria.text: Sample address literal present once, byte-exact.
Page mentions the product noun 'agent'.
proof: grep -qi 'agent' design/agent-wallet.html matches the heading 'Your agent's address.', the hint 'Your agent uses this wallet...', and the title 'Agent address'

acceptance_criteria.text: :root tokens byte-identical to landing.html.
proof: /* theme: dark */ comment precedes the :root { line

acceptance_criteria.text: body font-family byte-exact landing stack.
proof: body CSS declares font-family: "JetBrains Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "SF Mono", "Fira Code", ui-monospace, monospace

acceptance_criteria.text: var(--accent) referenced only in .cta / a.cta / hover / focus / focus-visible rules.
proof: line 101: inside 'a.cta:hover, a.cta:focus, a.cta:focus-visible { ... }' rule block (outline: 2px solid var(--accent);)

acceptance_criteria.text: Responsive via @media max-width or fluid units on heading.
File size strictly less than 12288 bytes.
Visible body word count strictly less than 80.
proof: Tokens: Agent, address, Your, agent's, address., atlas, Show, address, 0x1234abcd5678ef901234abcd5678ef9012345678, Your, agent, uses, this, wallet, to, hold, balances., Copy, it, from, the, bot, message., Done

acceptance_criteria.text: Exactly one <h1>, inner text byte-equals 'Your agent's address.'.
proof: h1 inner text byte-equals 'Your agent's address.' (3 words, trailing period)

acceptance_criteria.text: No transform: or text-transform: anywhere.
Collateral check: prior four design files unchanged; exactly 5 files in design/.
proof: pre-build sha256 captured to artifacts/prior-designs-pre.sha256 BEFORE edits
post-build sha256 captured to artifacts/prior-designs-post.sha256 AFTER edits
diff pre vs post exits 0 (SHA MATCH)
ls design/ | sort returns exactly five lines: agent-wallet.html, agents.html, landing.html, running.html, wizard.html

acceptance_criteria.text: No regressions on 11 prior tasks (tdd-agent-deployer excluded or skipped if UNKNOWN).
